info.description: Real-estate platform API — property listings, rentals, messaging, digital wallets & payments.
info.title: Gidana API

get.summary: List the current user's property alerts
List all conversations for the current user

post.summary: Start or retrieve a conversation about a property

get.summary: Get a single conversation with its messages

post.summary: Send a message in a conversation

get.summary: List the current user's favourite properties (paginated)

post.summary: Add or remove a property from favourites

patch.summary: Set an image as the main property photo

parameters.description: Bedsitter | Studio | Apartment | Maisonette | Bungalow | Townhouse | Villa | Commercial
parameters.name: property_type

get.summary: List the current user's property listings
Get a single property by ID

post.summary: Add an image to a property

get.summary: List all reviews for a property

post.summary: Submit a review for a property

get.summary: Get the current user's search history

post.summary: Save a search term to history (no-op if not authenticated)

delete.summary: Clear the current user's search history

patch.summary: Update the Expo push notification token

parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of raw request body
parameters.name: X-CINETPAY-SIGNATURE

content.example: Hello, I am interested in renting this property.

price.description: Pricing — ISO 4217 currency codes (KES, USD, EUR, GBP, NGN, GHS, TZS, UGX …)

property_type.description: Bedsitter, Studio, Apartment, Maisonette, Bungalow, Townhouse, Villa, Commercial

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and your JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
